topic.what: Detecting malicious pre-trained ML models distributed via model hubs like Hugging Face using learned behavioral patterns
topic.how: Trains one-class SVM classifier on dynamic system call traces from task-specific clusters of benign models to identify outlier malicious behaviors
topic.why_matters: Model hubs distribute millions of PTMs serving millions of users but are vulnerable to malicious uploads; existing blacklisting/whitelisting detectors miss novel attack vectors

characteristics.what_it_measures: Detection effectiveness balancing precision and recall
characteristics.evidence: Table 6: DynaHug vs PickleScan, ModelScan, Fickling, ModelTracer, Llama-3.1, GPT-5.2
characteristics.context: Best performing across text-generation (0.9963), text-classification (0.9893), feature-extraction (0.9930)

characteristics.what_itasures: Avoid false positives on benign models
characteristics.context: Near-perfect precision; only 1 false positive on 2025 benign models
Detected 2024 of 2025 malicious models across real and injected datasets
Covers Hugging Face, MalHug, PickleBall, and synthetic injected models

characteristics.evidence: Section 5 RQ2: DynaHug 0.9963 vs best static 0.6902
characteristics.context: Outperforms static (44%), LLM-based (33%), dynamic blacklist (18%) approaches

characteristics.vs_baseline: vs ModelTracer causing false positives on benign socket calls
characteristics.evidence: Table 6: 1 FP on 2025 HF benign models
characteristics.context: Significantly lower FPR than blacklist-based dynamic detectors

good_for: detecting novel malicious payloads not in blacklists
task-specific PTM detection on Hugging Face
unseen malicious model variants via behavioral learning
requires: sandboxed execution environment for dynamic analysis
compute for strace monitoring during deserialization

novelty: First ML-based approach combining dynamic analysis for PTM detection
Task-specific clustering before behavioral model training
Anomaly detection via one-class SVM on system call features instead of blacklists
Frequency-based system call features outperforming presence-only or sequence features
open_problems: Generalization to other model hubs beyond Hugging Face
Additional dynamic features (API call graphs, control flow)
